title: UnstableSMP - 2v1000 Fight
description: You've probably all seen that video from wemmbu and flamefrags where they both fought against 1,000 players. So with this modpack, you can fight against 1,000 players (bots) and see how long you can survive.
body:
![Unstable SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2917b1cf11887bd7b72308a834eb3c6d342768a.png)

![trailer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bef78b9714096335c87aaae206ff33d952d7c8e6.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/u1fE3eYuCGk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![idk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602f58c1bf77512b1c66d9e25dde18162a2d3ce7_0.webp)

**Thanks to this PvP ModPack, you can practice your PvP skills against a large number of players (bots)**
> - All the necessary mods for better gameplay are already pre-installed.
> - All the necessary mods for PvP and optimization are also pre-installed.
> - A training map styled after UnstableSMP is pre-installed.

**By downloading this modpack, you won't have to bother with the tedious process of installing maps, selecting mods, etc.**



![nukes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5874cf34edf5a2e7b8e1e0bb062d43ef4d0eeaa0_0.webp)
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa4bdcd808d87bb09afb72c2cf720edf92686b0.png)




<details>
<summary>IMPORTANT: </summary>

USE ONLY 1.21 OR 1.21.1 WITH THIS MAP (IF YOU WANT EVERYTHING TO WORK CORRECTLY)
Wemmbu cannot mace on newer versions, and orbitals will not work on newer versions (everything else works fine)

</details>
